prefillPrompt: Build me a Google and Meta campaign for my product

hero.headline: Campaign setup takes 3 hours.
hero.subhead: Toffu researches your competitors, maps your USPs, builds keyword lists, and launches full campaigns on Google and Meta. You approve. It ships.

demo.content: Build me a Google and Meta campaign for my SaaS product
Pulling competitor ads, keywords, and audience data...
Generating campaign structure, ad copy, and creatives...

**Campaign Build Complete**

Here's what I built:

**Google Search**
- 3 ad groups (47 keywords)
- 9 responsive search ads
- Estimated CPC: $1.80-$2.40

**Meta**
- 2 ad sets: Lookalike 2% + Interest stack
- 6 ad creatives (feed + story formats)
- Daily budget split: 60/40 cold/warm

Total estimated setup time saved: 2.5 hours.

Campaigns are paused and ready. Say "launch" and I'll activate both.

findings.title: Campaign setup is slow, inconsistent, and error-prone.

items.title: Competitor research done manually
items.desc: You spend 45 minutes looking up what competitors are running before you write a single headline. Toffu pulls it automatically before the brief is done.

items.title: Keyword lists built from guesswork
items.desc: Without volume data and intent signals in front of you, keyword lists miss obvious winners. Toffu pulls search volume, competition, and intent in one pass.

items.title: Ad copy written from scratch every time
items.desc: Every new campaign starts at a blank page. Toffu generates headlines and descriptions from your product, your competitors, and what's already converting in your account.

items.title: Campaign structure inconsistent across clients
items.desc: Each campaign built by hand comes out differently. Naming conventions drift. Ad groups overlap. Toffu builds to a consistent structure every time.

items.title: Manual QA catches maybe half the issues
items.desc: Missing UTMs, wrong landing pages, unapproved destinations. Toffu checks every field before launch so you don't find out about the mistake after spend starts.

howItWorks.title: From brief to live campaign in one conversation.

steps.title: Tell Toffu what you're promoting
steps.desc: Your product, URL, target audience, and budget. One message. No brief template to fill out.

steps.title: Toffu researches, builds, and structures everything
steps.desc: Competitor ads, keyword lists, ad copy, campaign structure, creatives, UTMs. Done in under 3 minutes.

steps.title: You review and approve
steps.desc: Toffu shows you the full plan before touching anything. One click to launch. You stay in control.

afterSection.title: Toffu keeps running after the campaign goes live.
afterSection.subhead: Setup is just the start. Toffu monitors performance, flags issues, and tells you what to change.

items.title: Daily performance checks
items.desc: Toffu checks every campaign every morning and flags anything that's off: CPCs up, conversions down, budget pacing wrong.

items.title: Budget scaling recommendations
items.desc: When a campaign is hitting its cap during peak hours, Toffu tells you exactly how much to increase and what revenue it should unlock.

items.title: Creative fatigue alerts
items.desc: When CTR starts dropping, Toffu flags the affected ads and suggests replacements before performance craters.

faq.question: Which platforms does Toffu build campaigns for?
faq.answer: Google Ads (Search, Performance Max) and Meta Ads (Facebook and Instagram). Both in the same conversation.

faq.question: Does Toffu need access to my ad accounts?
faq.answer: Yes. You connect your Google Ads and Meta accounts during onboarding. Toffu reads your historical data to build smarter campaigns from day one.

faq.question: Can Toffu build campaigns for any industry?
faq.answer: Yes. Toffu pulls competitor data and keyword research specific to your product and market. It works for SaaS, ecommerce, lead gen, and agencies managing multiple clients.

faq.question: Does it actually launch the campaigns or just draft them?
faq.answer: Both. Toffu drafts the full campaign and shows it to you first. You approve, then it launches. Nothing goes live without your sign-off.

faq.question: How long does it actually take?
faq.answer: Under 3 minutes from first message to a ready-to-launch campaign. The research, copy, and structure are all done in one pass.

finalCta.title: Your next campaign is 3 minutes away.
finalCta.subhead: Right now you're about to spend 2-3 hours on setup that Toffu can do while you drink your coffee. Connect your accounts and build your first campaign free.

seo.title: Campaign Builder | Toffu AI
seo.description: Build full Google and Meta campaigns in minutes. Toffu researches competitors, generates keywords, writes ad copy, and structures campaigns automatically.
seo.ogTitle: Build a full campaign in 3 minutes
seo.ogDescription: Toffu researches competitors, builds keyword lists, writes ad copy, and launches Google and Meta campaigns. You approve. It ships.
